infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SmartPlay uses the camera for the rangefinder and swing video analysis.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SmartPlay uses the microphone for caddie listening and voice control.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SmartPlay uses your location to measure accurate golf yardages.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: SmartPlay tracks your location during a round so yardages and auto-hole-progression keep working when your phone screen sleeps.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SmartPlay saves your swing videos and rangefinder photos to your library.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: SmartPlay saves your swing videos and rangefinder photos to your library.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: SmartPlay uses Bluetooth to connect to your Galaxy Watch for yardage display and shot tracking.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: SmartPlay uses Bluetooth to connect to your Galaxy Watch for yardage display and shot tracking.

plugins.cameraPermission: SmartPlay uses the camera for rangefinder mode and swing capture.
plugins.microphonePermission: SmartPlay uses the microphone for voice commands and shot feedback.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: SmartPlay uses your location to provide front, middle, and back yardages.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: SmartPlay keeps your location active during a round so yardages and auto-hole-progression keep working when your phone screen sleeps.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: SmartPlay keeps your location active during a round so yardages and auto-hole-progression keep working when your phone screen sleeps.

plugins.photosPermission: SmartPlay accesses your photos so you can review saved swing videos.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: SmartPlay saves your golf images and videos to your library.
